title: Add a /status endpoint to the health service
description: The health_service.py module has a /health endpoint that returns {"status": "ok"}. Add a new /status endpoint that returns {"status": "ok", "version": "1.0.0", "uptime_seconds": <integer>} where uptime_seconds is the number of seconds since the module was imported. Use the `time` module. Update the test file so that test_status_endpoint passes.
